form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign to post a big 6 len win. Monbetsu November 13 over 1700m defeating Steel Agate with 56kg at $1.20. When resuming last campaign sixth of 11 at Monbetsu August 21 over 1600m, 12 len behind Love Me Cannes with 55kg at $3.20. Bold performance expected.

formComments.title: TAB

Bold performance expected.

form.formComment: Last start 9th of 12 at this track on March 26 over 1400m, 14 len behind Lugalbanda with 56kg at $29. The run before that sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 12 at this track on February 20 over 1600m, 6 len behind Non Fiction carrying 56kg at $20.20. Nice alley and worth including.

form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 9 at this track on March 26 over 1600m, 10 len behind Espiegle carrying 56kg at $16.60. Before that eased back early on 5th of 9 at this track on March 12 over 1400m, 8 len behind Elizabeth Buddy with 56kg at $30.30. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

form.formComment: Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at this track on March 26 over 1600m, 7 len behind Espiegle with 54kg at $113.20. Before that second last of 12 at this track on January 29 over 1600m, 10 len behind Astral Gate with 54kg at $30.20. Preferred in something easier.

form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut held ground to the line 2nd of 7 at this track on October 6 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Road Luce with 53kg at $11.70. Returned from break 3rd of 9 at this track on March 10 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Will Mischievous with 54kg at $1.70. Among the top chances.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 35 day let-up. At the latest run 2nd of 12 at this track on March 11 over 1600m, neck behind Musashi Tarumae carrying 56kg at $2.10. Before that 2nd of 11 at this track on January 27 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Mieno Wild with 56kg at $2.40. Winning chance after a narrow defeat last start.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at this track September 18 over 1600m, 7 len behind Dawn Luce with 54kg at $119.10. On debut fourth of 7 at this track July 1 over 1400m, 6 len behind Pod Festa with 54kg at $17.10. Not keen on her chances.
